introSection: Wild Mouse Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Clacton Pier in Clacton-on-Sea, Essex, England, UK.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Originally opened yellow track and unpainted supports. It was later repainted to red track and yellow supports. The ride currently has green track with purple supports, which it received in 2020.

fullText:
Wild Mouse Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Clacton Pier in Clacton-on-Sea, Essex, England, UK.



Originally opened yellow track and unpainted supports. It was later repainted to red track and yellow supports. The ride currently has green track with purple supports, which it received in 2020.
